comments: Both the Alice Cooper track and Accept 'Son Of A Bitch' drop the F-bomb, language not heard on the BBC at the time, surprising they got played!
Tommy comments that he had been listening to rough mixes from the new Ozzy Osbourne LP (Bark At The Moon)
Tom raves about the new Yes single (Owner Of A Lonely Heart) "the quality of production is exceptional".
NOTE: Second file now re-uploaded and should be ok to download now!

sessions.artist: Accept - recorded 3 July 1983 in Dierks Studio
sessions.details: Cologne by Tony Wilson & Dave Dade. Originally broadcast 19 August 1983
